feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman challenged Lt. Surge after clearing the Rocket and Team Gas power sabotage.

feed.speaker: Lt. Surge
feed.text: Lt. Surge marked Antman as a serious challenger after the Vermilion gym battle.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Antman earned the Thunder Badge. Red says the journey east can finally begin.

feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: Misty logged Surge's respect beat and warned that Rocket will adapt after losing the harbor grid.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Route 11 path unlocked. The Kanto journey can move toward the next Rocket signal.
